executionPlan: Fix color bugs and create semantic system
result.summary: Comprehensive UI audit completed. App has functional foundation but suffers from hardcoded colors, inconsistent patterns, generic aesthetic, and purple-tinted neutrals. Proposed: Deep Trust Blue palette (#2B5EA7), cool grey neutrals, Inter font, semantic color system, tonal elevation, 4dp spacing grid.
weaknesses: No date grouping in transaction list
Purple-tinted neutrals clashing with blue primary
